title: Numbers 1–100
description: Count, give your age, and say phone numbers in English.
summary_pt_br: Números de 1 a 100 em inglês. As 'teens' (13–19) e os múltiplos de 10 são as duas regras mais importantes.

exercises.explanation: Watch the -teen vs. -ty pattern: thirTEEN (13) is stressed on the end, THIRty (30) on the start.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Diferença-chave: 13 tem ênfase no final (-teen), 30 no começo (-ty).

exercises.question: How do you say 21 in English?
exercises.explanation: Two-digit numbers above 20 use a hyphen: twenty-one, thirty-two, forty-five.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Use hífen entre a dezena e a unidade: twenty-one, forty-three.

exercises.question: Someone asks 'How old are you?' — a natural reply is:
exercises.explanation: English uses BE for age: 'I AM 25 years old'. Not 'I have 25 years' (that's Portuguese/French structure).
exercises.hint_pt_br: Cuidado: em inglês usa-se 'to be' (I AM 25), não 'to have'.

exercises.question: The next number: 70, 80, ___.
exercises.hint_pt_br: 90 = ninety (escreva com 'ni' — sem 'y' no lugar do 'i').

exercises.question: Your phone number ends in 007. How would you say it out loud?
options: All three are natural in different contexts
exercises.explanation: For phone numbers, digits are said one by one. 'Double-zero' is common in the UK, 'zero zero' in the US, and British English also says 'oh' /oʊ/ for zero.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Em números de telefone, cada dígito é dito separadamente.

exercises.explanation: Three 'landmarks' worth memorizing exactly — they don't follow the normal pattern.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Números irregulares que é melhor decorar: twelve (12), twenty (20), one hundred (100).

turns.speaker: ai
turns.pt: A conta é quarenta e cinco.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Thank you. What is your phone number?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: It is seven two three nine eight one.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Let me repeat — seven two three nine eight one.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Correct. How many apples do you want?

scenes.title: Listening story — Numbers 1–100
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Shopkeeper and a student. Count, give your age, and say phone numbers in English. Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Thank you. What is your phone number?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Shopkeeper. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.
